Identity.Name: StingFireRatings
Identity.Definition: Fire-resistance ratings per BS EN 13501-2 / Approved Document B. The two-letter prefix encodes the criteria tested (R=loadbearing, E=integrity, I=insulation, W=radiation, S=smoke leakage); the number is minutes. Drives Pset_StingFire.Rating, AEC filter packs (FD60 doors etc.), and the healthcare fire-compartmentation pack (HTM 05-02).

Governance.StandardsBasis: BS EN 13501-2:2016 fire resistance classification; UK Approved Document B (Fire Safety); BS 9999 strategic fire compartmentation; HTM 05-02 healthcare fire

Value.Definition: Fire Door 30 — 30-minute integrity. Internal compartment door per ADB.
Fire Door 30 with cold-smoke seal — 30-min integrity + smoke leakage limit.
Fire Door 60 — 60-minute integrity. Cross-corridor / dept boundary doors.
Fire Door 60 with cold-smoke seal.
Fire Door 90.
Fire Door 120 — 120-min integrity. Stair-core / refuge doors.
Element of structure — integrity 30 min only (no insulation requirement).
Integrity 60 min only.
Integrity 90 min only.
Integrity 120 min only.
Integrity + Insulation 30 min — partition walls.
Integrity + Insulation 60 min — dept boundary walls. Healthcare default per HTM 05-02.
Integrity + Insulation 90 min.
Integrity + Insulation 120 min — stair shafts, lift shafts, refuge enclosures.
Integrity + Insulation 240 min — high-rise compartment floors.
Load-bearing + Integrity + Insulation 60 min — structural compartment elements.
Load-bearing + Integrity + Insulation 90 min.
Load-bearing + Integrity + Insulation 120 min — structural elements in high-rise + healthcare.
Load-bearing + Integrity + Insulation 240 min — extreme structural fire rating.
No fire rating required — non-compartment partition.
